title: Bray's Barnyard Overhaul
description: A pack that adds mob variants for many animal mobs!
body:
# Animal Mob variants!
All the variants for cows, chickens, goats, llamas and more that you love from [Bray's World](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld) in their own, convenient seperate pack! Bring variety to your farms and mobs as you explore your worlds :)

![Freerange Chickens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xKj6QlAd/images/e566e3ce666826a2a6de79a8228f78686b4253b9.png)
## Fresh Animations
Some mobs will have added detail when this pack is used with Fresh Animations which adds detail to models and custom animations that bring the mobs to life!

[Check out Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)

![Animal Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eedb95892557ab451499c8c04c516643ccb7bea_0.webp)
